note: Curated, theme-tagged verse SHORTLIST — the heart of the matching engine. We deliberately DO NOT store verse text here. The real, licensed text is fetched live from the YouVersion Platform API at runtime. This is both an anti-hallucination guarantee (the model never recites Scripture from memory) and a licensing-compliance choice. 'usfm' is YouVersion's reference format (BOOK.CHAPTER.VERSE); verify exact passage-range syntax against the API during integration.

verses.note: Bring worry to God; his peace guards the heart.
Don't borrow tomorrow's worry; today is enough.
Cast your anxiety on him because he cares for you.
Do not fear; I am with you and will strengthen you.
Be strong and courageous; God goes with you.
A spirit of power, love and self-control — not fear.
Even in the darkest valley, you are with me.
The Lord is near the brokenhearted.
Blessed are those who mourn — they will be comforted.
He will wipe every tear; no more pain.
He heals the brokenhearted and binds their wounds.
Come to me, weary one, and I'll give you rest.
Those who hope in the Lord renew their strength.
Don't grow weary in doing good; the harvest comes.
Run with perseverance the race set before you.
Blessed is the one who perseveres under trial.
Suffering produces perseverance, character, hope.
Trust in the Lord; he will direct your paths.
I believe; help my unbelief.
Give thanks in all circumstances.
This is the day the Lord made; rejoice in it.
Rejoice in the Lord always.
Plans to give you a future and a hope.
God works all things together for good.
May the God of hope fill you with joy and peace.
He will never leave you nor forsake you.
Be content; he will never leave you.
Confess, and he is faithful to forgive.
No condemnation for those in Christ.
As far as east is from west, so far he removes our sins.
You are God's handiwork, created for good works.
Seek first his kingdom; your needs are known.
God will supply all your needs.
Nothing can separate you from God's love.
God rejoices over you with singing.
His mercies are new every morning.
My peace I give you; let not your heart be troubled.
Perfect peace for the mind that is stayed on God.
Cast your burden on the Lord; he will sustain you.
When anxieties were many, your consolations cheered my soul.
Let the peace of Christ rule in your hearts.
The Lord of peace give you peace at all times.
The Lord is my light and salvation; whom shall I fear?
When I am afraid, I put my trust in you.
I hold your right hand and say, do not fear.
Perfect love casts out fear.
He goes before you; do not fear or be dismayed.
I have called you by name; you are mine.
Fear not; you are worth more than many sparrows.
The battle is not yours, but God's.
Weeping may last the night, but joy comes in the morning.
The God of all comfort, who comforts us in affliction.
Jesus wept — he enters our grief.
My heart may fail, but God is the strength of my heart.
Beauty for ashes, the oil of joy for mourning.
Do not grieve as those who have no hope.
Those who sow in tears shall reap with joy.
God sets the lonely in families.
I am with you always, to the very end.
Wherever I go, your hand will lead me.
I will not leave you as orphans; I will come to you.
The Lord is near to all who call on him.
My ways are higher than your ways, says the Lord.
Faith is the assurance of things hoped for.
If any of you lacks wisdom, ask God.
Be still, and know that I am God.
We walk by faith, not by sight.
Trust in the Lord with all your heart.
Create in me a clean heart, O God.
Though your sins are scarlet, they shall be white as snow.
He will cast all our sins into the depths of the sea.
In him we have redemption, the forgiveness of sins.
If anyone is in Christ, he is a new creation.
While we were still sinners, Christ died for us.
Be quick to listen, slow to anger.
A soft answer turns away wrath.
Be angry and do not sin; do not let the sun set on your anger.
Whoever is slow to anger has great understanding.
Cease from anger and forsake wrath; do not fret.
Put away anger, wrath, and malice.
He gives power to the faint and strength to the weak.
My grace is sufficient; my power is perfected in weakness.
He restores my soul; I shall not want.
For God alone my soul waits in silence.
My presence will go with you, and I will give you rest.
In peace I will lie down and sleep.
Come away by yourselves and rest a while.
He gives sleep to those he loves.
I press on toward the goal for the prize.
Be steadfast; your labor is not in vain.
I have fought the good fight; I have finished the race.
Rejoice in hope, be patient in tribulation.
Though the outer self wastes away, the inner self is renewed.
Hold fast to hope; he who promised is faithful.
Be watchful, stand firm, be strong.
Enter his gates with thanksgiving.
Whatever you do, do it all giving thanks.
Give thanks to the Lord, for he is good.
Every good and perfect gift is from above.
The joy of the Lord is your strength.
That my joy may be in you and your joy be full.
In your presence is fullness of joy.
Why so downcast, my soul? Put your hope in God.
Hope does not put us to shame.
We have this hope as an anchor for the soul.
Be strong and take heart, all who hope in the Lord.
When you pass through the waters, I will be with you.
God is our refuge and strength, an ever-present help.
He who dwells in the shelter of the Most High.
Underneath are the everlasting arms.
The Lord is good, a stronghold in trouble.
Before I formed you in the womb I knew you.
The heart plans the way, but the Lord directs the steps.
Be transformed by the renewing of your mind.
Whatever you do, work at it with all your heart, for the Lord.
For such a time as this.
God is able to make all grace abound to you.
I have not seen the righteous forsaken.
How much more will your Father give good gifts.
For God so loved the world that he gave his only Son.
See what great love — that we are called children of God.
I have loved you with an everlasting love.
I am fearfully and wonderfully made.
Christ lives in me; he loved me and gave himself for me.
You are a chosen people, called out of darkness into light.
Those who know your name trust in you.
Commit your way to the Lord; trust him.
God is my salvation; I will trust and not be afraid.
Pray without ceasing.
Ask and it will be given; seek and you will find.
Pray for one another, that you may be healed.
